name: Cognitive Dynamics (JEPA)
description: Learned cognitive state predictor. Encodes turn-level state into 64-dim latent space, predicts next state, computes surprise (prediction error) as a real-time anomaly metric.

surpriseThreshold.description: Surprise value above which to flag a turn

logLatentVectors.description: Include full 64-dim latent vectors in log

agentFilter.description: Only track this agent ID (empty = track all)
